app.title: LLM Wiki
app.subtitle: Build and maintain your personal knowledge base with LLMs

purpose.label: Project purpose
purpose.placeholder: Describe the purpose of this project in markdown. (optional)

error.nameAndPath: Please enter both a name and a path.

sources.title: Raw Sources
sources.importHint: Import documents to start building your wiki
sources.delete: Delete source and related wiki pages
sources.deleteConfirm:
Delete "{{name}}" and its related wiki pages?

This will:
- Delete the source file
- Delete wiki pages generated from this source
- Update index.md

chat.ingestPlaceholder: Discuss the source or ask follow-up questions...
chat.emptyHint: Ask a question or start an ingest to begin.

history.title: History
history.selectCommit: Select a commit to see its changes here
history.noFileSelected: Select a file to see the diff
history.conflictBody:
Revert produced conflicts. Resolve the following files manually and try again:
{{files}}

settings.title: Settings
settings.customModel: Or type a custom model name
settings.customEndpointHint: Any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (e.g., LiteLLM, vLLM, LocalAI, Azure OpenAI)
settings.languageHint: Interface language (wiki content follows source material language)

llm.title: LLM Models
llm.description: One row per vendor. Toggling one on automatically turns off the others. Changes save instantly; each vendor's API key is stored independently so switching doesn't lose data.
llm.toggleOn: Click to activate (turns off other providers)
llm.apiKeyPlaceholderCustom: Leave empty if no key (local models)

embedding.title: Vector Embeddings
embedding.description: Enable semantic search against your wiki. Works with any OpenAI-compatible /v1/embeddings endpoint. Local models (LM Studio, Ollama embedding) don't need an API key.
embedding.enableHint: When off, search uses token matching only.
embedding.sourceBuiltin: Built-in (BGE-small, ~130 MB, downloaded on first use)
embedding.sourceBuiltinHint: Uses the bundled BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 model via fastembed. The model (~130 MB) is downloaded to ~/.cache/fastembed on first use. No external server needed.
embedding.maxChunkCharsHint: Target size of each chunk. Lower this (e.g. 500) when your endpoint's context is small (llama.cpp n_ctx=512, mxbai-embed-large, etc.).
embedding.overlapChunkCharsHint: Characters of overlap between adjacent chunks so ideas aren't severed at boundaries.
embedding.legacyPromptBody: Your project has {{count}} entries in the old per-page vector store. The new per-chunk index gives better retrieval but needs a one-time re-embed. Run "Re-index all pages" to upgrade.

output.title: Output Preferences
output.description: Controls for generated content — language, conversation history length.
output.aiLanguageHint: Force AI-generated content (chat replies, wiki pages, lint reports) to use the selected language. Pick "Auto" to let the AI follow the user's input or source document language.
output.historyHint: Number of prior messages sent to the AI on each request. More = richer context but more tokens.

interface.title: Interface
interface.description: UI language and appearance. Changes apply immediately and persist.
interface.uiLanguageHint: Affects labels, buttons, and other UI strings only. The AI output language is set separately in Output Preferences.

about.title: About
about.autoCheck: Check for updates automatically on startup (at most once every 6 hours)
about.appDescription: An LLM-driven personal knowledge base. Source:

preview.notAvailable: Preview not available for this file type

fileTree.injectDialogTitle: Select files to extract knowledge from
fileTree.injectUrlPrompt: Enter a web page URL to extract knowledge from:
